name: UBA : DPAPI Backup Master Key Recovery Attempted
notes: Detects when recovery is attempted for a DPAPI Master Key.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event matches Event ID (custom) is any of 4693
TD_list: APPLY UBA : DPAPI Backup Master Key Recovery Attempted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event matches Event ID (custom) is any of 4693
RED_list: Event name: UBA : DPAPI Backup Master Key Recovery Attempted
